properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Wren is not unlocked with this skin. Wren can only be unlocked by completing Twice Through the Great Wheel - the second Variant of the Titan on the Town adventure in the Turn of Fortune's Wheel Campaign.

backstory.original: Wren woke up in the Mortuary with the Champions and, like them, had no memory of who she was. The talking skull, Morte, gave her a name and from there she journeyed with the Champions on a quest to discover who they were. Along the way, disaster struck twice and Wren was killed - but each time she quickly returned in the form of herself from somewhere else in the Multiverse!
backstory.display: 雷恩和勇士们一起在殡仪馆里醒来，和勇士们一样，她也不记得自己是谁了。会说话的骷髅莫特给她起了一个名字，从此她便和勇士们一起踏上了查明自己是谁的旅程。途中，灾难两次降临，雷恩也被杀了，但每次她都迅速以她自己的形态从多元宇宙的其他地方归来！

description.original: Wren strikes the most damaged enemy for one hit.
description.display: 雷恩攻击受伤最严重的敌人并命中一次。

description.original: For 15 seconds, Wren deals ultimate damage in a small radius when she attacks.
description.display: 在 15 秒内，雷恩攻击时会在小范围内造成杀招伤害。

longDescription.original: Wren manifests her Astral Self form for 15 seconds. For the duration, when she attacks, she hits her target and all nearby enemies for ultimate damage.
longDescription.display: 雷恩会在 15 秒内显现出她的星界本体形态。这段时间内，她攻击时会对目标和附近所有敌人造成杀招伤害。

description.desc: Wren always counts as all her Glitch forms, regardless of the form she has chosen for the current adventure. She can also be used in any Turn of Fortune's Wheel adventure or variant, regardless of any restrictions.
无论雷恩当前冒险选择了何种形态，她总是算作她所有的变异形态。她还可以被用于任何命运之轮旋转冒险或支线任务，不受任何限制。
Wren increases the damage of all Champions in her column (including herself) and the column behind her by $(amount)%.
雷恩可使她所在纵队（包括其自身）和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Wren increases the damage of all Champions in her column and the column behind her, including herself.
tipText.display: 雷恩使她所在纵队和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士（包括其自身）的伤害提高。

description.desc: Wren remains in her dwarf monk form, unlocks the Astral Self Form ultimate, and focuses on her DPS role. She also gains +$(amount) DEX and +$(amount___2) WIS.
雷恩维持她的矮人武僧形态，解锁“星界自身形态”杀招，并专注于她的伤害输出角色。她还会获得 +$(amount) 敏捷和 +$(amount___2) 感知。

specializationDescription.original: Wren remains in her dwarf monk form from Krynn, focusing on directly dealing damage to enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 雷恩保留了她在克莱恩的矮人武僧形态，专注于直接对敌人造成伤害。

name.display: 变异形态：斑猫人野蛮人

description.desc: Wren takes on the form of a Tabaxi Barbarian. She unlocks the Colossal Rage ultimate, the Battleaxe base attack, gains 20 overwhelm, and focuses on her Tanking role. She also gains +$(amount) STR and +$(amount___2) CON.
雷恩变换为斑猫人野蛮人形态。她会解锁“巨人之怒”杀招、战斧基本攻击，获得 20 点击溃点数，并专注于她的坦克角色。她还会获得 +$(amount) 力量和 +$(amount___2) 体质。

specializationName.display: 变异形态：斑猫人野蛮人

specializationDescription.original: Wren takes on the form of a Tabaxi Barbarian from Toril, focusing on protecting her allies.
specializationDescription.display: 雷恩变换为她在托瑞尔的斑猫人野蛮人形态，专注于保护她的盟友。

description.desc: Wren takes on the form of a Warforged Sorcerer. She unlocks the Time Stop ultimate, the Fire Bolt base attack, and focuses on her Debuff role. She also gains +$(amount) INT and +$(amount___2) CHA.
雷恩变换为机关人术士形态。她会解锁“时间停止”杀招、火焰箭基本攻击，并专注于她的减益角色。她还会获得 +$(amount) 智力和 +$(amount___2) 魅力。

specializationDescription.original: Wren takes on the form of a Warforged Sorcerer from Eberron, focusing on debuffing her enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 雷恩变换为她在艾伯伦的机关人术士形态，专注于对她的敌人施加减益。

description.desc: All three of Wren's glitch forms yearn to be utilized. For each area completed, all three forms gain a yearning stack, which generally persists between adventures. Wren's chosen form buffs her Hero's Call by $(amount___6)% for each yearning stack for her chosen form, stacking additively. Yearning stacks for any glitch form she has specialized in during your current adventure are set to zero at the end of the adventure.

effect_keys.per_trigger_expr: { AppendToSaveStat(`wren_monk_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) AppendToSaveStat(`wren_barbarian_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) AppendToSaveStat(`wren_sorcerer_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) }

{ if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_monk_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 1)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_barbarian_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 2)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_sorcerer_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } SetSaveStat(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0) }

effect_keys.expr: { if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15217)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0) } if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15218)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 1) } if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15219)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 2) } }

description.desc: 雷恩的所有三种变异形态都渴望得到利用。每完成一个区域，所有三种形态都会获得一层渴望堆叠，这通常会在不同冒险之间持续。雷恩选中的形态每有一层渴望堆叠，她选中的形态就会使她的“英雄召唤”加成 $(amount___6)%，以加算方式堆叠。在冒险结束时，她在当前冒险中专用的变异形态的渴望堆叠层数会重置为零。

effect_keys.per_trigger_expr: { AppendToSaveStat(`wren_monk_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) AppendToSaveStat(`wren_barbarian_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) AppendToSaveStat(`wren_sorcerer_yearn_stacks`, false, trigger_count) }

{ if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_monk_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 1)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_barbarian_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } if (StatIsBitFlagSet(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 2)) { SetSaveStat(`wren_sorcerer_yearn_stacks`, false, 0) } SetSaveStat(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0) }

effect_keys.expr: { if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15217)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 0) } if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15218)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 1) } if (GetUpgradeUnlocked(15219)) { StatSetBitFlag(`wren_spec_bits`, false, 2) } }

name.display: 化身的职业——武僧的坚韧

description.desc: Wren increases her damage by $(amount)%.
雷恩使她的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Depending on which glitch form you choose, Wren focuses on her dps, tanking, or debuffing abilities.
tipText.display: 根据你选择的变异形态，雷恩专注于她的伤害输出、坦克或减益技能。

name.display: 化身的职业——野蛮人的坚毅

description.desc: Wren increases her health by $(amount)% and then further increases her health by $(amount___2)% (multiplicatively) for every $(areas_per_stack___2) areas completed in the current adventure, up to area $(max_stacking_area___2).
雷恩使她的生命值提高 $(amount)%，随后在当前冒险中每完成 $(areas_per_stack___2) 个区域，就进一步使她的生命值提高 $(amount___2)%（以乘算方式堆叠），最多到区域 $(max_stacking_area___2)。

tipText.original: Depending on which glitch form you choose, Wren focuses on her dps, tanking, or debuffing abilities.
tipText.display: 根据你选择的变异形态，雷恩专注于她的伤害输出、坦克或减益技能。

name.display: 化身的职业——术士的烈焰

description.desc: Enemies damaged by Wren catch fire and take $(amount)% more damage from subsequent Champion attacks.
受到雷恩伤害的敌人会着火，并且后续勇士的攻击会使其额外受到 $(amount)% 的伤害。

tipText.original: Depending on which glitch form you choose, Wren focuses on her dps, tanking, or debuffing abilities.
tipText.display: 根据你选择的变异形态，雷恩专注于她的伤害输出、坦克或减益技能。

description.desc: When Wren defeats an enemy, her base attack cooldown immediately recharges.
当雷恩击败一名敌人时，她的基本攻击冷却时间会立即获得充能。
Wren increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of her max health, and healing effects on all Champions is increased by $(amount___2)%.
雷恩增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $(amount)%，并且所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $(amount___2)%。
Wren's base attack Stuns enemies for $(duration) seconds.
雷恩的基本攻击会使敌人眩晕 $(duration) 秒。
Wren increases the effect of Hero's Call by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Turn of Fortune's Wheel adventure, variant, or patron variant completed, stacking multiplicatively.
每完成一个命运之轮旋转冒险、支线任务或赞助者支线任务，雷恩会使“英雄召唤”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,15210,15211,15212","description":"Increases the effect of Wren's Incarnation's Class ability by $amount%"}

description.original: We may not remember where we got these skills, but we can still use them.
description.display: 我们或许不记得我们是在哪里习得这些技能的了，但我们依然能使用它们。

description.original: The strength of the giants guides our attack!
description.display: 巨人之力指引着我们进攻！

description.original: We will never back down. Evil has no place here!
description.display: 我们绝不退缩。这里容不得邪恶！

description.original: It's going to take a lot more to take us down!
description.display: 想打倒我们没这么容易！

description.original: When our backs are against a wall, we will always find a way out.
description.display: 当被逼到绝境时，我们总能找到出路。

description.original: We were hoping to fight more than this.
description.display: 我们还以为战斗会更激烈一点呢。

description.original: Now THIS is what we're talking about!
Being a hero is much different than just wanting to be one.
description.display: 成为英雄和仅仅想成为英雄有很大的不同。

description.original: Heroes need training and skill. You can do this.
description.display: 英雄需要训练和技能，你可以的。

description.original: We don't always agree with who is in control, but we always work together.
description.display: 我们并非什么时候都与掌权者意见一致，但我们总是会齐心协力。

description.original: Heroes never die. They just become legends.
description.display: 英雄永不死，他们只会成为传奇。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Wren's Incarnation's Class ability by $amount%

description.original: Gather around, and listen to the tale of the Champions...
description.display: 围过来，听听勇士们的故事……

character_sheet_details.backstory: Wren woke up in the Mortuary with the Champions and, like them, had no memory of who she was. The talking skull, Morte, gave her a name and from there she journeyed with the Champions on a quest to discover who they were. Along the way, disaster struck twice and Wren was killed - but each time she quickly returned in the form of herself from somewhere else in the Multiverse!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Wren is a glitch Champion that embodies one of three different species and roles based on the specialization you chose. The forms you don't pick gain power over time.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Wren is not unlocked with this skin. Wren can only be unlocked by completing Twice Through the Great Wheel - the second Variant of the Titan on the Town adventure in the Turn of Fortune's Wheel Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 雷恩和勇士们一起在殡仪馆里醒来，和勇士们一样，她也不记得自己是谁了。会说话的骷髅莫特给她起了一个名字，从此她便和勇士们一起踏上了查明自己是谁的旅程。途中，灾难两次降临，雷恩也被杀了，但每次她都迅速以她自己的形态从多元宇宙的其他地方归来！
character_sheet_details.system_description: 雷恩是一位变异勇士，会根据你选择的专精表现为三种不同种族和角色中的一种。你没有选择的形态会随着时间推移获得力量。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士雷恩不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“再次穿越大转轮”——“命运之轮旋转”战役中“城中泰坦”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁雷恩。
